lines.hearsay: {place} went quiet a moment while somebody counted coins onto a table.
lines.gossip: {B} put money in {A}'s hand at {place} before {A} had to ask for it, which has not happened since the spring — {A} counted it twice and still called it short, and {B} did not argue, because {B} worked out years ago that letting {A} have the last word costs less than the arrears do.
lines.report: {B} tendered part payment against arrears to {A} at {place}, slot {slot}.
